feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: LAUNCHPAD SCREEN ERROR - FIND MAINTENANCE ORDER
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When searching for the Maintenance Order in the app and editing it, then clicking on the PM note, we get this error. Does anyone know of any missing settings that could resolve this? We tried SAP NOTE 2723550 without success...

Regards

Adilson

entry.title: implement a value help for a field in the list report page using a second OData entity set
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I have a Fiori Elements app with a list report page and an object page. I am trying to implement a value help for a field in the list report page using a second OData entity set. I have adjusted the annotations accordingly, but the value help is not working as expected. Can I get some help on how to correctly set up a second OData entity set for the value help in a Fiori Elements app?

ZCL_ZODATA_LEITER_AUS_DPC_EXT WERTEHILFEUSERNA_GET_ENTITYSET

Best Regards,
Amir Alhamoud

entry.title: How to prevent techinical users to not perform a dialog login in PI/PO
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

How can we prevent SAP PO technical users from doing a dialog login. Could you please share the approach and steps to be followed.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 如何实时监控(Hana某表的)删除事件 How to runtime-subscribe to deletion events for a ERP​ table
entry.content:
您好, 我们有个安全与容灾项目, 需要实时的监控某些表的删除事件,  以实现对高敏感业务操作的实时预警和自动处理; 

现在的问题是: 我们不知道要如何才能订阅到 相关ERP表中某行记录的删除事件 (有PrimayKey主键),  希望SAP能提供这方面的方案建议和指导; 

 

We would like to know how to subscribe to deletion events for specific rows in related ​ERP​ tables (with a ​Primary Key). ​SAP​ is requested to provide solution suggestions and implementation guidance on this topic.

entry.title: SAP note implementation steps
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am implementing snote 3631594(parent note) which is having 28 correction notes (prerequisite notes), my question is do we need to implement all 28 prerequisite notes first or we just need to implement parent note 3631594 and all the prerequisite notes will be implemented automatically?Please help on this its urgent. Thank you!

entry.title: Process chain cannot be activated, deleted, executed
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We have a process chain, similar to other ones and not modified in QUAL environment for last 2 years.

When executed through metachain, it appeared as yellow in process monitoring, but never triggered actually. In table RSPC_PROCESS_LOG, it appeared with blank status.

We tried to execute end of previous process, run via SM37 FM API chain start, activate again, transport it again from DEV system.

But every action failed and got out of time. Even trying to delete it from QUAL system got a TIMEOUT dump.

 

What can we do ?

Thanks

entry.title: OData Service: “No system alias found for service” after transport to QA – why is “LOCAL” missing?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’ve created an OData service that reads data from a custom table and provides PDF downloads. Everything is fully implemented and working in our development system (DEV). The service also runs fine in the Gateway Client (/IWFND/GW_CLIENT).

After transporting it to QA, I’m getting the following error in the Gateway Client:

500 – No system alias found for service

When I checked the service in QA via /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE, I noticed that there is no system alias “LOCAL” defined at all.

This confused me because in DEV the service is assigned to the alias “LOCAL”, but in QA it doesn’t exist.

What also makes it strange:

Other OData services in QA and PROD are working fine—even though they also don’t have any system alias assigned. So the system somehow works without explicitly having “LOCAL” configured.

My questions:

Why does “LOCAL” exist in DEV but not in QA/PROD?

Shouldn’t this be consistent?

How is it possible that other OData services work without any system alias at all?

Is the system using some kind of implicit local alias?

What is the correct way to fix this issue for my new OData service?

Do I need to create the alias manually in QA, or is there a better approach?

How can I make sure that existing productive OData services won’t be affected by this configuration?

entry.title: SQL Server Encryption
entry.content:
We want to Encrypt the data of our MS SQL database at rest and in transit, in accordance with security practices recommended under the DPDP Act and related IT guidelines. Kindly help us with the best practice to encrypt our data.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SU01 User group mandatory field
entry.content:
Are there any SAP Note to inform how to configure in SU01 tcode that the User group mandatory is a mandatory field to avoid creation of user with blank groups?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: It's possible to perform a reorg in all tables at the same time? - SAP ASE
entry.content:
We want to perform a reorganization, ideally on all tables. However, we could not find a note similar to KBA 1757691 that contains a script to perform a full reorganization of all DB tables. Is it possible for you to provide us with a script to perform reorganization on all tables? Or must it be done one by one?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CX_DBA_PARSE_ERROR in DBACOCKPIT Dump History - ASE 16.0.04.07 on SAP Kernel 754
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am encountering a dump in DBACOCKPIT when trying to access Backup and Recovery -> Database Dump History.

Error Details:

  • Exception: CX_DBA_PARSE_ERROR

  • Class: CL_SYB_DBMS_UTILS

  • Method: CAST_FMT_TSTAMP_TO_DB6TSTAMP

  • Message: Unable to parse date/time.

System Environment:

  • SAP Kernel: 754 Patch 628 (64-bit Unicode)

  • DB Client Library: Sybase ASE 16.0.04.07

  • OS: SLES 15

What I have checked so far:

  1. OS Locales: The environment variables for sidadm and sybsid are set to en_US.UTF-8.

     

  2. https://me.sap.com/notes/2780872/E: I found this Note which describes the exact issue, but it only references older SAP Notes (for Basis 7.40) and does not provide specific correction instructions for Basis 754.

  3. Note 1558958: This collection note also seems to target older releases.

It seems like the ABAP parser cannot handle the date/time format returned by the ASE 16.0.04.07 engine.

Does anyone know the specific Correction Collection Note for SAP_BASIS 754 that addresses this timestamp parsing issue? Or is there a specific DB parameter/locale setting within ASE that could force a compatible date format?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: How to check if my enviroment is ASE stand-alone or Business suite.
entry.content:
Is there any way to check whether the Sybase db in bussiness suite or enterprise/stand-alone?





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is ADS stateless?
entry.content:
Hello, we have question about ADS usage:

Exists 2 independent ADS servers SID1 and SID2 (not one SID with CI+AS). We want to balance incomming load (and have some server redundancy) via webdispatcher (kernel 7.54) and parameter "wdisp/system_conflict_resolution=ROUND_ROBIN". This parameter exists as valid in documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_AS_ABAP_752/683d6a1797a34730a6e005d1e8de6f22/b0ebfa88e9164d26bdf1d21a7ef6fc25.html?locale=en-US with remark "Keep in mind that then all requests must be stateless.". Is not clear if ADS requests are stateless or not (My feeling is - should be). Can you answer this question?

Thank you, Martin

entry.title: Mark role as “OBSOLETE” in PFCG
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts.

I can’t market role as obsolete in PFCG. This menu item is missing.

Moreover, in another systems this menu item is present.

Product - SAP NETWEAVER AS ABAP  

Release - 7.11

SP \ FP Stack - 14 (01/2015)

Product Version - SAP EHP1 FOR SAP NW ABAP 7.1

Installed components:

SAP_BASIS        711       0020     SAPKB71120    SAP Basis Component

SAP_ABA           711       0020     SAPKA71120    Cross-Application Component

PI_BASIS           711       0020     SAPK-71120INPIBASIS Basis Plug-In

ST-PI     2008_1_710     0037     SAPK-71037INSTPI      SAP Solution Tools Plug-In

ST-A/PI 01W_710          0000     -             Servicetools for other App./Netweaver2007

 

Maybe you know how to fix it? I will appreciate it.

entry.title: Updated to JAVA UPGRADE 1.8.0_481 & Regulation Field in EHS Incidents Now Blank. Fix?
entry.content:
Updated to Java 1.8.0_481 and the Regulation field in EHS incidents are coming up "No Regulations Detected" 

Did the Java update break the system when it checks these entries against the regulations defined in Customizing? If the entries match, the regulations for this incident are displayed. If the entries do not match, “No regulations detected” is displayed.

Entries have valid regulations that apply to the incidents based on the plant, location, region, and country.   How can we fix this?

entry.title: SPAU cannot change status Partly obsolete, completely implemented, has to be confirmed
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

I have next situations:

During  the upgrade QAS system we used SPDD/SPAU requests from DEV system.

As result, after upgrade we can see minimum delta in SPAU (between DEV-QA), but one of SAP note is cannot be confirmed/adjusted. It has status "Partly obsolete, completely implemented, has to be confirmed".

When I choose option "Confirm partly obsolete SAP Note"  and press Execute then  message "Action successfully completed" appears, but status of sapnote does not change (still partly obsolete): 

I checked via SNOTE, it looks OK, sapnote "Completely implemented", new version downloaded.

I don't know what to do, should I ignore it?

entry.title: How to verify ASE database size and allocation details in Netweaver?
entry.content:
• Is there a way to check database size/allocation without running OS-level commands?
  • How can database space usage be checked without using isql commands?
  • How can database space allocation be monitored through the SAP GUI?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Can't find documentation for .sap Shortcut files
entry.content:
Hi Team,

in projects we are using *.sap shortcut files and they work fine.

Now we need a shortcut file which should use our snc configuration and automatically open the SAP system.

Unfortunately I can't find any documentation for the parameters espaecially the SNC parameters for *.sap file.

See a example of one of our  shortcut files attached.

Is there a documentation available or can you give me the snc parameters?

Many thanks in advance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: What kinds of instances are there in SAP R/3?
entry.content:
i want to understand finally what are all the passible instances types, and what each instances include.
thank you 🙂

entry.title: Question:Whether the NetWeaver SDK can be used with S/4HANA 2025 and its support expiration date
entry.content:
Is it possible to communicate with SAP S/4HANA 2025 (on-premises/private cloud) using the NetWeaver RFC SDK?

Additionally, while the end of support for the NetWeaver RFC SDK has been announced for the end of 2027, is there a successor product available after this date?
